message:
fix: namespace diff baseline issues in single-repo workspace mode

When the current load target is a workspace, file-based diff baselines
loaded via --diff-since were compared with raw (unprefixed) issue IDs
against namespace-prefixed current issues, causing all current issues to
appear as "new". Now applies workspace namespace prefixing to the baseline
when the workspace has a single repo, so diff IDs match correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
